title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Maersk India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Maersk India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Distribution Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
